name: INTELLIGENT Grid Operator Middleware V2 Workflow
description: Defines the event-driven workflow of the Grid Operator Middleware under WP3 Task 3.3 for pulling, validating, routing, and auditing electricity grid signals and market transactions.

pipeline.name: Message Ingestion & Parsing
pipeline.action: Parse raw binary payload of the incoming Pub/Sub message into a structured JSON object. If parsing fails, ACK immediately and send format failure record to audit trail.

pipeline.name: Transport Header Validation
pipeline.action: Verify presence and datatype of necessary transport fields: messageId, exchange, timestampUtc, pilotId, scenarioId, and payload. Ensure 'exchange' discriminator is one of the 5 valid types.

pipeline.name: Ontology payload validation
pipeline.action: Verify that the message payload matches the semantic schema definitions in D3.1 (INTELLIGENT ontology) for the resolved exchange type (e.g. Traffic light code 0/1/2 for GridSignal status).

pipeline.name: Downstream Routing & Authorization
pipeline.action: Resolve the appropriate pilot target endpoint URL and retrieve the associated security token. Perform HTTP POST request with specific security headers.

pipeline.name: Audit Logging
pipeline.action: Publish an asynchronous tracking record containing the original messageId, exchange type, final delivery status, and response details to the 'store_data' Pub/Sub topic for BigQuery storage.

pipeline.name: Transaction Acknowledgment
pipeline.action: Invoke message.ack() to remove the processed message from the GCP subscription queue, concluding the pipeline run successfully.
